zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh FitzOsbern於大約1095年出生在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素時，他的父親Osbern le Scrope51歲，母親Nest ferch Gruffudd37歲。他於1128年與Eustachia Saye在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1141年1月8日在他的家鄉享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh FitzOsbern was born about 1095, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, his father, Osbern le Scrope, was 51 and his mother, Nest ferch Gruffudd, was 37. He married Eustachia Saye in 1128, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 8 January 1141, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

Il a épousé Eustachia Saye en 1128, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1141, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzOsbernが約1095年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルで生まれた時，父Osbern le Scropeは51歳，母Nest ferch Gruffuddは37歳であった。1128年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルでEustachia Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1141年1月8日に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzOsbern(이)가 대략 1095년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osbern le Scrope(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Nest ferch Gruffudd(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1128년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 Eustachia Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1141년 1월 8일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh FitzOsbern родился около 1095 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Osbern le Scrope было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Nest ferch Gruffudd, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Eustachia Saye в 1128 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 8 января 1141 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.
